name: compliance auto-refresh: iterates every framework in COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml whose last fetched_at is older than its fetch_frequency
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && for id in nist-csf-2 owasp-asvs; do echo "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z" > ".claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/$id.txt"; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/auto-refresh-daily.sh" --now 2026-05-13T08:00:00Z --upstream-stub "$PWD/upstream.sh" --report 2>out.txt && grep "nist-csf-2" out.txt 1>&2 && grep "owasp-asvs" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
